blockingIssues.description: `Ingest.batch()` still allows direct inserts into lookup tables because it lacks the same `table_info.is_lookup` guard added to `Ingest.row()`, so batch calls can still auto-create protected lookup rows through `deep_upsert()`.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented in `.factory/library/environment.md` that committed write-based cleanup may require a higher-privilege localhost connection because `quantdb-test-user` cannot delete committed rows from tables like `objects`.
